race.description: Pre Training At Domeland Provincial Mdn Hcp
race.comment: AURORA EFFECT (2) bursting to get off the mark fourth-up. Had no luck along the inside when she finished sixth in a tight finish over 1550m at Randwick Kensington in a Super Maiden. Was just over seven weeks between runs at the latest and looks hard to hold out in this easier contest. SICCIUS (1) appreciated the jump in trip at his second career start with a fighting on-pace second over 1500m at Port Macquarie. Will appreciate the claim and expected to go close in this stronger race. BELGRANO (6) finished in the minor money at this course earlier in the prep and has been kept fresh today. Three weeks between runs when back in trip for a disappointing last over 1600m at Goulburn in C1 grade. Chad Lever sticks in a weaker event. Place best. PROPANE (11) mixing his form and on the quick back-up after struggling to run the 1900m out when seventh at Newcastle from an awkward gate. Drops in weight and worth thought.
